CMS_WISER_OPERATIONAL_GUIDE_V6.title: CMS WISeR Provider and Supplier Operational Guide v6.0
CMS_WISER_OPERATIONAL_GUIDE_V6.note: Used for WISeR routing guidance. Confirm the latest CMS version before a pilot.

PILOT_CLINICAL_WORKFLOW.title: Pilot wound-care documentation readiness checklist
PILOT_CLINICAL_WORKFLOW.note: Clinical workflow signal gathered during discovery. It is not represented as a CMS coverage rule.

INTERNAL_FORMAT_CHECK.title: Prototype code-format validation
INTERNAL_FORMAT_CHECK.note: Format and presence checks only. Complete code-level CMS and MAC logic is not yet encoded.

documentation_checks.label: Baseline wound measurement
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to establish the starting condition of the wound.

documentation_checks.label: Serial wound progression measurements
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand progression across visits.

documentation_checks.label: Photographic documentation
documentation_checks.rationale: Clinical discovery identified photographs as a commonly missing evidence type.

documentation_checks.label: Standard-of-care failure documentation
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand prior care and why advanced therapy is being considered.

documentation_checks.label: Vascular assessment documentation
documentation_checks.rationale: Clinical discovery identified vascular assessment evidence as a recurring documentation gap.

documentation_checks.label: Infection assessment
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand infection status before advanced therapy review.

documentation_checks.label: Infection treatment history
documentation_checks.rationale: Clinical discovery identified treatment history as useful supporting evidence.

documentation_checks.label: Prior treatments
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand the prior wound-care pathway.

documentation_checks.label: Product rationale
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand the selected product and intended plan.

documentation_checks.label: Continued care plan
documentation_checks.rationale: The reviewer should be able to understand the planned wound-care pathway.

documentation_checks.label: DFU offloading documentation
documentation_checks.rationale: Clinical discovery identified offloading as a recurring DFU documentation gap.

documentation_checks.label: VLU compression documentation
documentation_checks.rationale: Compression documentation is a wound-type-specific readiness signal for VLU workflows.
